problem id: 53b84650
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01010101 -> 10000000
  10010000 -> 01101001
  11110000 -> 10011001
  00011100 -> 00110110
  11011100 -> 11010111
  00010011 -> 00101111
  00111001 -> 01101110
  11110110 -> 10010110
  01001110 -> 10111011

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 11111101
